response.raw:
Form pad 20, bg #f8f8f8, rad 8, gap 16
  Text fs 24, weight bold, "Login"
  
  Box gap 8
    Text "Email"
    Input type email, pad 12, rad 6, bg white, width 100%
  
  Box gap 8
    Text "Passwort" 
    Input type password, pad 12, rad 6, bg white, width 100%
  
  Button bg #3B82F6, col white, pad 12, rad 6, width 100%, "Login"
    hover
      bg #2563EB

  Text col #666, center, "Noch kein Account?"
    hover
      col #3B82F6
response.processed:
Box pad 20 bg #f8f8f8 rad 8 gap 16
  - Text fs 24, weight bold, "Login"

  - Box gap 8
    - Text "Email"
    - Input type email, pad 12, rad 6, bg #FFFFFF, width full

  - Box gap 8
    - Text "Passwort"
    - Input type password, pad 12, rad 6, bg #FFFFFF, width full

  Button bg #3B82F6 col #FFFFFF pad 12 rad 6 width full "Login"
    hover bg #2563EB

  - Text col #666666, center, "Noch kein Account?"
    hover col #3B82F6

review.notes: Good length: 12 lines; Uses 9 components; Clean Mirror syntax; Uses property shortcuts; Proper nesting
